# FolderSync

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FolderSync;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FolderSync { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
directory, synchronize, synchronise, refresh, reconnect, transfer, backup

## Categories
files, arrows

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/folder-sync)
